manifest.name: Finance Operations Showcase Service Blueprint
manifest.readme:
# Finance Operations Showcase

Generated example ANIP package from Studio-style source docs.

intent.summary: Get current market data for a ticker symbol.
Execute a buy or sell trade after current market data is available.
Transfer funds between accounts with transactional recovery posture.
Generate a daily, holdings, or transaction report.

implementation_fit.rationale: The generated ANIP substrate exposes the contract; the legacy showcase app remains useful implementation material.

capability_formalizations.title: Get market data
capability_formalizations.summary: Get current market data for a ticker symbol.

implementation_fit.rationale: The generated ANIP substrate exposes the contract; the legacy showcase app remains useful implementation material.

inputs.clarification_hint: Ask for symbol when it is missing or ambiguous.

capability_formalizations.title: Execute trade
capability_formalizations.summary: Execute a buy or sell trade after current market data is available.

implementation_fit.rationale: The generated ANIP substrate exposes the contract; the legacy showcase app remains useful implementation material.

inputs.clarification_hint: Ask for symbol when it is missing or ambiguous.
Ask for side when it is missing or ambiguous.
Ask for quantity when it is missing or ambiguous.

capability_formalizations.title: Transfer funds
capability_formalizations.summary: Transfer funds between accounts with transactional recovery posture.

implementation_fit.rationale: The generated ANIP substrate exposes the contract; the legacy showcase app remains useful implementation material.

inputs.clarification_hint: Ask for from_account when it is missing or ambiguous.
Ask for to_account when it is missing or ambiguous.
Ask for amount when it is missing or ambiguous.

capability_formalizations.title: Generate report
capability_formalizations.summary: Generate a daily, holdings, or transaction report.

implementation_fit.rationale: The generated ANIP substrate exposes the contract; the legacy showcase app remains useful implementation material.

inputs.clarification_hint: Ask for report_type when it is missing or ambiguous.

permission_intent_bindings.governed_outcome: Allow tutorial users to invoke declared capabilities within the scopes shown by each capability.
permission_intent_bindings.formalization_strategy: Generated examples keep policy simple and visible for onboarding.

runtime_policy_bindings.business_rule: Use the declared capability scope and required inputs as the tutorial boundary.
runtime_policy_bindings.enforcement_notes: Generated examples use simple policy so the contract remains readable.

capability_mappings.title: Get market data
capability_mappings.intent: Get current market data for a ticker symbol.

capability_mappings.title: Execute trade
capability_mappings.intent: Execute a buy or sell trade after current market data is available.

capability_mappings.title: Transfer funds
capability_mappings.intent: Transfer funds between accounts with transactional recovery posture.

capability_mappings.title: Generate report
capability_mappings.intent: Generate a daily, holdings, or transaction report.
